verses.1: A Prayer of David. Incline Your ear, LORD, and answer me; For I am afflicted and needy.
verses.2: Protect my soul, for I am godly; You my God, save Your servant who trusts in You.
verses.3: Be gracious to me, Lord, For I call upon You all day long.
verses.4: Make the soul of Your servant joyful, For to You, Lord, I lift up my soul.
verses.5: For You, Lord, are good, and ready to forgive, And abundant in mercy to all who call upon You.
verses.6: Listen, LORD, to my prayer; And give Your attention to the sound of my pleading!
verses.7: On the day of my trouble I will call upon You, For You will answer me.
verses.8: There is no one like You among the gods, Lord, Nor are there any works like Yours.
verses.9: All nations whom You have made will come and worship before You, Lord, And they will glorify Your name.
verses.10: For You are great, and you do wondrous deeds; You alone are God.
verses.11: Teach me Your way, LORD; I will walk in Your truth; Unite my heart to fear Your name.
verses.12: I will give thanks to You, Lord my God, with all my heart, And I will glorify Your name forever.
verses.13: For Your graciousness toward me is great, And You have saved my soul from the depths of Sheol.
verses.14: God, arrogant men have risen up against me, And a gang of violent men have sought my life, And they have not set You before them.
verses.15: But You, Lord, are a compassionate and gracious God, Slow to anger and abundant in mercy and truth.
verses.16: Turn to me, and be gracious to me; Grant Your strength to Your servant, And save the son of Your maidservant.
verses.17: Show me a sign of good, That those who hate me may see it and be ashamed, Because You, LORD, have helped me and comforted me.
